Title: Super-Constant Weight Dicke States in Constant Depth Without Fanout
Summary: An $n$-qubit Dicke state of weight $k$, is the uniform superposition over all $n$-bit strings of Hamming weight $k$. Title: Variational quantum state preparation within an entangle-rotate circuit framework for quantum-enhanced metrology in noisy systems
Summary: We investigate the generation of quantum states for precision metrology in noisy two-level systems. These states are obtained by optimizing a variational quantum circuit to maximize the quantum Fisher information (QFI) of the output state for a given decoherence rate and interaction Hamiltonian.
